item.title: The 4-Day Sprint: How I Navigated a High-Stakes KMP Refactor
item.description: My native Android app was live and stable, when a key stakeholder arrived with a familiar request: they needed iOS support, and they needed it fast.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: Hello World! Welcome to My Blog
item.description: A brief introduction to this blog, the tech stack powering it, and what you can expect to read here in the future.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: Syntax Highlighting Preview
item.description: A showcase of how various programming languages are rendered in this blog using Astro and Shiki.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: This is a sample MDX post with a cover image. It shows the glassmorphism and clean typography.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: A Minimalist Post
item.description: This post does not have a cover image to demonstrate the nullable cover image functionality.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: The 4 Day Sprint: Menavigasi Refactor KMP yang High-Stakes
item.description: Aplikasi Android native saya sudah live dan stabil, sampai seorang stakeholder datang dengan permintaan yang familiar: mereka butuh dukungan iOS, dan butuh secepatnya.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari

item.title: Halo Dunia! Selamat Datang di Blog Saya
item.description: Perkenalan singkat mengenai blog ini, teknologi yang saya gunakan, dan apa yang bisa kamu harapkan di masa mendatang.
item.author: Muhammad Tantowi Jauhari
